name: Work swimlane stories
description: Fetches every story in a board swimlane (status column), then runs a Cursor CLI agent (auto mode, composer-2.5) executing the /work skill on each story in a loop.
content: {"id":"work-swimlane-stories","name":"Work swimlane stories","runtime_inputs":[{"input_type":"string","key":"swimlane","label":"Board swimlane (status)","required":true}],"spoke_root":"/home/fang/code/s_e_e_project/s_e_e_project","tasks":[{"capture_output":true,"function":{"input":{"action":"list_stories","status":"{{runtime.swimlane}}"},"name":"story_action"},"id":"resolve_story_ids","name":"Resolve story ids for swimlane","next_tasks":[{"function":{"input":{"collection_task_id":"resolve_story_ids","collection_task_path":["story_ids"],"item_runtime_key":"story_id"},"name":"foreach"},"id":"for_each_story","name":"For each story","next_tasks":[{"function":{"input":{"command_id":"cursor-agent","config":{"cursor_model":"composer-2.5"},"prompt":"{{prompt.system-work-story}}"},"name":"command"},"id":"work_story","name":"Work story (Cursor CLI, composer-2.5, auto mode)","next_tasks":[{"function":{"input":{"args":["work skill finished for {{runtime.story_id}}; verify status: Done in the story file."],"command":"echo"},"name":"cli_command"},"id":"report_done","name":"Report completion","next_tasks":[]}]}]}]}]}
